states.name: Sun Wukong
states.title: Celestial Bride
states.description:
Wukong was only too glad to wear the heavenly robe, but she wasn't aware of its original purpose. When she finally learned that it was a wedding outfit, her face flushed deep red.
"Whaaa??? It's that kind of robe!? No way!"

states.name: Sun Wukong
states.title: Celestial Bride
states.description: Wukong couldn't wrap her head around the idea of a robe only meant to be worn for one occasion—especially not for a ceremony performed to unite two people for the rest of their lives. Her mind was always occupied with food, training, Tianzhu, food, Nimbus, food, food, food... She couldn't even imagine herself falling in love.

states.name: Sun Wukong
states.title: Celestial Bride
states.description:
And yet, a certain name came to her mind—someone she could see herself marry. She shook her head violently.
"This kind of stuff doesn't suit me at all!" she yelled, but just as was about to take the robe off, she heard that person's voice saying, "That's a pity. You'd look so pretty as a bride," and she felt herself turn red as a beet again.
"I wouldn't! Stupid!"
